Package org.eventb.core

Interface IConfigurationElement

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IRodinElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IContextRoot, IMachineRoot, ISCContextRoot, ISCMachineRoot
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextRoot, MachineRoot, SCContextRoot, SCMachineRoot
public interface IConfigurationElement extends IRodinElement
The contents of Event-B models is interpreted with respect to configurations: a configuration describes a certain composition of modules of the static checker and the proof obligation generator.

The value of the configuration, a string, is used to retrieve instances of static checkers proof obligation generators. They are declared in extensions of type configuration contributed to the extension point configurations.

Each configuration selects a set of processor and filter modules.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IModule
  • ISCFilterModule
  • ISCProcessorModule
  • IPOGFilterModule
  • IPOGProcessorModule

    • setConfiguration

      void setConfiguration(String configuration, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the configuration of this element.
      Parameters:
      configuration - the specified configuration
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database
